rationale: ai girlfriend is the dominant entry-point query for users curious about AI companions; ai boyfriend captures the female/queer audience segment often underserved in this space; ai companion is the broader umbrella term comparison shoppers use when evaluating platforms; ai chatbot is the gateway term for users frustrated by mainstream restrictions seeking adult-capable alternatives; character chat targets users who want personality-driven roleplay rather than generic assistants; ai roleplay surfaces fantasy/scenario seekers who are core to Pleasur's creator product; virtual girlfriend is a long-running adjacent term that pre-dates AI and still pulls high volume from the target demo; ai waifu captures the anime/character-fandom segment heavy on customization demand; nsfw chatbot is the explicit-intent term for users specifically rejecting censored mainstream tools; ai porn is the high-volume adjacent term for the AI Image Generation product where users seek on-demand adult visuals.
